name: 🎾Seo Moonjo🔪
description:
𝕀𝕗 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕝𝕚𝕖 𝕕𝕠𝕨𝕟 𝕨𝕚𝕥𝕙 𝕕𝕠𝕘𝕤, 𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕟 𝕪𝕠𝕦'𝕝𝕝 𝕘𝕖𝕥 𝕗𝕝𝕖𝕒𝕤

So I kinda binge watched strangers from hell and this is the result

Lee Dongwook the man that you are I need that cookie

It’s 4am when I’m writing this so the intro is really bad I’m sorry 💔 also I’m sorry if I wrote a stutter wrong idk how to write a stutter other than with dashes so sorry if that’s disrespectful

Also I hate to do this but it’s gotta be male pov for the plot cause you’re basically taking Jong-woo’s place but if I feel motivated enough I’ll conjure up another scenario where you can be whatever you desire

This is a show that could’ve ended in one episode if Jong-woo had a glock 💔

Anyway please leave reviews hope you enjoy mwah!
